global_description: A small, agile bird with a compact, streamlined body. It has a distinctive white breast and face, contrasted by a blue-gray back and wings. The bird's head is adorned with a black cap and nape, and it features a short, pointed bill. Its tail is short and square.

part_details.head: Black cap and nape, white face with a short, pointed bill.
part_details.body: Compact and streamlined with a white breast and blue-gray back.
part_details.wings: Blue-gray, blending with the back, providing a sleek appearance.
part_details.tail: Short and square, matching the blue-gray of the wings.

spatial_relations: The black cap covers the top of the head and nape.
The white breast transitions into the blue-gray of the back.
The wings are positioned laterally, extending from the sides of the body.
